title: Machine Learning Specialization
description: Learn the fundamentals of machine learning including supervised learning, unsupervised learning, and recommender systems. Build real-world ML models using Python and NumPy. Covers linear regression, logistic regression, neural networks, decision trees, clustering, and anomaly detection.

title: Machine Learning A-Z: AI, Python & R
description: Learn to create Machine Learning Algorithms in Python and R from two Data Science experts. Includes regression, classification, clustering, association rule learning, reinforcement learning, NLP, and deep learning.

title: Machine Learning with Python - Full Course
description: Learn machine learning with Python using TensorFlow 2.0, Keras, scikit-learn, and more. Covers classification, regression, clustering, neural networks, and practical projects. Perfect for absolute beginners.

title: Applied Machine Learning in Python
description: This course will introduce the learner to applied machine learning, focusing more on the techniques and methods than on the statistics behind these methods. Build ML models using scikit-learn for real-world datasets.

title: Deep Learning Specialization
description: Become an expert in deep learning, neural networks, and AI. Learn to build neural networks, improve deep learning projects, and master sequence models like LSTMs and Transformers. Includes CNN, RNN, and NLP projects.

title: PyTorch for Deep Learning - Full Course
description: Learn PyTorch for deep learning from scratch. Build neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, and transformers. Covers computer vision, NLP, and real-world projects. From basics to advanced deep learning architectures.

title: TensorFlow Developer Professional Certificate
description: Become a TensorFlow developer. Build and train neural networks using TensorFlow for image classification, NLP, and time series forecasting. Prepare for the TensorFlow Developer Certification exam.

title: Practical Deep Learning for Coders
description: Top-down approach to deep learning. Build practical AI applications using PyTorch. Covers image classification, NLP, tabular data, and collaborative filtering. Used by thousands of AI practitioners worldwide.

title: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
description: Kickstart your data science career with IBM. Learn Python, SQL, data analysis, visualization, machine learning, and apply skills to real-world data science projects. Earn a certificate recognized by employers.

title: Data Analysis with Python - Full Course

title: Python for Everybody Specialization
description: Learn to program and analyze data with Python. Covers Python basics, data structures, accessing web data, databases, and data visualization. One of the most popular Python courses online.

description: Learn Python by building 100 real-world projects in 100 days. Covers web development, data science, automation, game development, and more. The most comprehensive Python course available.

description: Master Python automation. Learn web scraping with BeautifulSoup, task automation, working with APIs, manipulating files, and building automation scripts for real-world workflows.

description: Learn JavaScript fundamentals including variables, arrays, objects, loops, functions, OOP, functional programming, and algorithmic thinking. Free certification from freeCodeCamp.
